description: Classic sneakers from fila, perfect for the all-sport lifestyle of the cosmopolitan male. An icon of casual dressing, wear this Surveillance shoe with a straightforward combination of jeans and a favourite tee.UpperSynthetic leather upper with synthetic leather overlaysReinforced overlay on the heel cup for abrasion free comfortCentral lacing system for a customised FitPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortPerforated upper at the midfoot and backfoot for ventilationMesh lining for breathabilityColoured overlay at the midfoot region for style and structureBranding on the side, tongue and collarMidsoleRubber midsole OutsoleTPU outsole with textured pattern for durability and gripCircular grooves at the midfoot region with brandingShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
